about.title: A digital presence for your business
about.description: At 404 Duo Not Found, we create custom, high-quality websites to help your business stand out online. We offer innovative solutions that combine aesthetics and functionality. From conception to implementation, we work with you to create a digital presence that reflects the unique identity of your business and attracts customers effectively.

items.title: Custom Design
items.description: We create unique and personalized designs that reflect your business's identity and attract customers effectively.

items.title: Scalable Structure
items.description: We develop websites with a scalable structure, allowing your business to grow without technical concerns.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: If you're interested in creating a custom website for your business or have any questions, don't hesitate to get in touch with us. We're here to help you achieve your online goals. Send us an email, and we'll respond as soon as possible.

hero.eyebrow: Fast, professional solutions designed to generate results
hero.title: Everything your business needs, in one click
hero.description: We create tailored solutions for brands, local businesses, and companies that need a serious digital presence.

services.title: What we offer
services.description: At 404 Duo Not Found, we offer a range of services to help your business establish a strong online presence. Our services include:

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Building modern, fast and scalable platforms for digital products and teams.

items.title: Apps and Interfaces
items.description: Intuitive experiences focused on performance, design and usability.

items.title: Automation and Integrations
items.description: Connecting systems, APIs and internal workflows to reduce manual work.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.description: Explore some of the projects and work developed.

MentalEase.title: MentalEase
MentalEase.description: A mental health support application with customized resources and tools.
MentalEase.content: MentalEase was developed to provide accessible and effective mental health support, offering a personalized, wellness-focused experience.

Sistema de elevadores.title: Elevator System
Sistema de elevadores.description: Elevator management and monitoring system with advanced features.
Sistema de elevadores.content: The Elevator System was developed to optimize building management and maintenance, providing a complete solution for monitoring and controlling equipment.

Smart Home.title: Smart Home
Smart Home.description: Home automation system with remote control and integration with smart devices.
Smart Home.content: Smart Home was developed to provide a more convenient and efficient living experience, enabling centralized control of all household devices.
